title: Leather Overhaul
description: Leather armor can be repaired/reinforced with armor kits, adds craftable/dyeable bundles, and allows for recycling of leather items.
body:
# Leather Overhaul

This mod is an attempt at fixing issues with leather as an in-game resource as well as giving the armor unique mechanics to incentivize its usage.

## Leather Armor Kits:

![Leather armor & armor kits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iKkgECWO/images/7d9645d3a8035ef7fd6c0a69c5d7493475f1bff0.png)

* Used to reinforce leather armor currently worn by the player. Each kit has 4 uses, with 1 consumed for each piece.
* Reinforced armor gains a second layer of durability represented by a blue bar. This is not affected by Unbreaking or Mending enchantments.
* Armor gains an additional point of protection until the reinforcement wears off.
* Applying an armor kit in a smithing table increases the amount of bonus durability and repairs the base durability by a small amount.
* The amount of extra durability is configurable.

## Armor Kit Potion Effects:

![Armor kit potion effects](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iKkgECWO/images/aff9d02befab7d7c5317e207b62c3d120708c112.gif)

* Potions with a positive effect and duration can be applied to leather armor with armor kits.
* Potion effects from leather armor are applied every time the armor is damaged.
* Effect is removed if bonus durability is depleted, or another armor kit is used.

## Leather Recycling:

![Leather recycling](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iKkgECWO/images/141b4de72d0ade24c9f2c019c6388420d30c2874.gif)

* Leather items can be placed in a crafting table with shears to recycle them for leather. Shears lose 3 durability per use.
* Leather armor above 50% durability gives 2 pieces of leather, 1 otherwise. Saddles and horse armor give 3 pieces.

## Bundles:

![Craftable bundles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iKkgECWO/images/027510c9d3bfdff8beb08d7991e7413b8ffd637c.gif)

* Bundles can be crafted with leather or rabbit hides. This is configurable to prevent overlap with other mods such as Quark.
* Bundles can be dyed for easier inventory management.
* Colors can be removed by using a dyed bundle on a cauldron with water.

## Leather Drops:
* Cows and Mooshrooms are guaranteed to drop 2 pieces of leather in addition to the base 0-2 drops to incentivize early game use.
* The amount of leather drops is configurable between 0-4.

## Compatibility:
* Mod is only compatible with Forge for now. I can't guarantee it will ever be ported to Fabric, and if so will be done at my own discretion.
* Not compatible with any mod which overrides leather armor or bundles.

## Modpacks:
* This mod can be included in any Modrinth modpack.
